values.name: kb_search
values.description: Search the remote knowledge base using hybrid vector+BM25 retrieval. Returns ranked chunks with source info.
values.inputSchema: {"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"Search query in any language"},"top_k":{"type":"integer","description":"Max chunks to return (default 5)"},"chat_id":{"type":"integer","description":"User chat ID to scope results"}},"required":["query"]}

values.name: kb_memory_get
values.description: Read stored memory for a user from a specific tier (short/middle/long).

values.name: kb_memory_append
values.description: Append a message to the user's short-term memory.

values.name: kb_memory_clear
values.description: Clear memory for a user, optionally filtered by tier.

values.name: kb_list_documents
values.description: List all documents uploaded by a user.

values.name: kb_delete_document
values.description: Delete a document and all its chunks from the knowledge base.

parameters.query: WITH vec_results AS ( SELECT c.chunk_id, c.doc_id, c.section, c.text, d.title AS source_uri, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c.embedding <=> $1::vector) AS vec_rank FROM kb_chunks c JOIN kb_documents d ON d.doc_id = c.doc_id WHERE d.owner_chat_id = $2 ORDER BY c.embedding <=> $1::vector LIMIT 20 ), bm25_results AS ( SELECT c.chunk_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ts_rank(c.fts, plainto_tsquery('simple', $3)) DESC) AS bm25_rank FROM kb_chunks c JOIN kb_documents d ON d.doc_id = c.doc_id WHERE c.fts @@ plainto_tsquery('simple', $3) AND d.owner_chat_id = $2 LIMIT 20 ), rrf AS ( SELECT COALESCE(v.chunk_id, b.chunk_id) AS chunk_id, (COALESCE(1.0/(60.0 + v.vec_rank), 0) + COALESCE(1.0/(60.0 + b.bm25_rank), 0)) AS rrf_score FROM vec_results v FULL OUTER JOIN bm25_results b ON v.chunk_id = b.chunk_id ) SELECT v.chunk_id::text AS chunk_id, v.doc_id::text AS doc_id, v.section, v.text, v.source_uri, r.rrf_score AS score FROM rrf r JOIN vec_results v ON v.chunk_id = r.chunk_id ORDER BY r.rrf_score DESC LIMIT $4
SELECT role, content, created_at::text FROM kb_memory WHERE chat_id = $1 AND tier = $2 ORDER BY seq ASC LIMIT 50

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = items.map(it => ({ role: it.json.role, content: it.json.content, created_at: it.json.created_at }));
return [{ json: { rows } }];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO kb_memory (chat_id, tier, role, content, tokens) VALUES ($1, 'short', $2, $3, length($3)/4) RETURNING seq

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ok: true, compacted: false, seq: items[0]?.json?.seq ?? null } }];

parameters.query: WITH deleted AS (DELETE FROM kb_memory WHERE chat_id = $1 AND ($2::text IS NULL OR tier = $2) RETURNING seq) SELECT count(*)::int AS deleted FROM deleted

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ok: true, deleted: items[0]?.json?.deleted || 0 } }];

parameters.query: SELECT d.doc_id::text, d.title, d.mime, d.source, d.created_at::text, (SELECT count(*)::int FROM kb_chunks WHERE doc_id = d.doc_id) AS n_chunks FROM kb_documents d WHERE d.owner_chat_id = $1 ORDER BY d.created_at DESC LIMIT 50
DELETE FROM kb_documents WHERE doc_id = $1::uuid RETURNING doc_id::text
